data.title: Shareholder Alert: Ademi LLP investigates whether Cyclerion Therapeutics Inc. is obtaining a Fair Price for Public Shareholders
data.description: Milwaukee, on April 1, 2026 - Ademi LLP is currently looking into Cyclerion (NASDAQ: CYCN) concerning potential breaches of fiduciary duty and other legal violations related to its newly revealed deal with Korsana. For those interested in participating in the investigation and acquiring further details, refer to the link provided.

data.title: Pennant Acquires Arbor Rose Senior Living Community in Mesa, Arizona
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Eagle, Idaho, The Pennant Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: PNTG) revealed the acquisition of the real estate and operations of Arbor Rose Senior Living in Mesa, Arizona. This senior living community will be rebranded as Lavender Lane Senior Living. The Pennant Group is the parent company overseeing a range of home health, hospice, home care, and senior living entities. This move signifies a strategic expansion in the senior living sector and showcases their commitment to growing their portfolio in the industry.
Luigi Mangione’s state trial is delayed from June to September - reports
Luigi mangione trial to begin sept 8 - reports
Trump is expected to overhaul steel and aluminum tariffs - WSJ.

data.title: Allied Announces Conference Call to Discuss First-Quarter Financial Results
data.description: A real estate investment trust, Allied Properties (TSX:AP.UN), is set to discuss their financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company will host a conference call and live audio webcast on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. (ET). The financial results are scheduled to be revealed on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, after the markets conclude trading.

data.title: Precision Drilling Corporation Announces Filing of Management Information Circular and Virtual-Only Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: Precision Drilling Corporation, known as Precision, disclosed the release of its Management Information Circular for the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. The document can be accessed through the Company’s SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca and the Company’s EDGAR Next profile at www.sec.gov, or directly from Precision’s website at www.precisiondrilling.com. The Annual Meeting is significant for shareholders as it provides crucial insights into the company's performance and future plans. This move emphasizes Precision’s commitment to transparency and shareholder engagement.

data.title: Piedmont Realty Trust, Inc. to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Atlanta-based Piedmont Realty Trust (NYSE: PDM) is set to unveil its first quarter financial results on April 30, 2026, after the market closes. Following this, on May 1, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET, a conference call will take place to delve into the results, recent developments, and engage in a Q&A session. The call will be live-streamed in listen-only mode on the company’s investor relations site. This update was released by the company, based in Atlanta, GA.

data.title: South Plains Financial, Inc. Completes Merger With BOH Holdings, Inc.
data.description: South Plains Financial, Inc. completed the merger of BOH Holdings, Inc. with itself, continuing as the surviving corporation, and the merger of BOH’s subsidiary, Bank of Houston, with City Bank. The effective date of the mergers was April 1, 2026. As of December 31, 2025, BOH had total assets of $744 million, total loans of $624 million, and total deposits of $603 million.

data.title: XAI Octagon Floating Rate & Alternative Income Trust Declares its Monthly Common Shares Distribution of $0.225 per Share
data.description: On April 1, 2026, XAI Octagon Floating Rate & Alternative Income Trust announced a regular monthly distribution of $0.225 per common share (NYSE: XFLT). The distribution will be paid on May 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 15, 2026. The Trust's annualized distribution rate on market price stands at 15.72%, with an annualized distribution rate on NAV of 12.11% as of the market close on March 31, 2026.

data.title: CubeSmart Announces the Date of Its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: CubeSmart, a real estate investment trust listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol CUBE, disclosed its plan to unveil financial outcomes pertaining to the first quarter of 2026 on April 30, 2026. The results will be shared post the market closure. A conference call is scheduled on May 1, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss these findings.

data.title: Gaming and Leisure Properties, Inc. Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: In Wyomissing, Pennsylvania, on April 01, 2026, Gaming and Leisure Properties, Inc. (NASDAQ: GLPI) disclosed its forthcoming first quarter financial report release scheduled after market hours on April 23, 2026. A conference call will be conducted at 10:00 a.m. ET on April 24, 2026, to discuss the results.

data.title: Kingstone CEO Meryl Golden Issues Shareholder Letter Following Record 2025 Results, Outlines Measured Expansion into California
data.description: Kingstone Companies, Inc., a property and casualty insurance holding company, announced its expansion into the California excess and surplus lines homeowners market in a letter to shareholders from President and CEO Meryl Golden. The company, listed on Nasdaq as KINS, focuses on the northeastern region and aims to tap into the lucrative California market. This move signifies the company's strategic growth plan and commitment to exploring new opportunities.

data.title: Idea Acquisition Corp. Announces the Separate Trading of its Class A Ordinary Shares and Warrants, Commencing on or about April 6, 2026
data.description: Idea Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: IACO) has disclosed that investors who purchased units in its initial public offering totaling 35,000,000 units on February 12, 2026, can now opt to individually trade the Class A ordinary shares and warrants from about April 6, 2026. If units remain intact, they will be traded on Nasdaq Global Market as "IACOU," while the Class A ordinary shares and warrants will trade separately as "IACO" and "IACOW," respectively. fractional warrants will not be given upon separation, with only whole warrants being tradable. Traders holding units must get in touch with Continental Stock Transfer & Trust Company, the transfer agent, to split units into Class A ordinary shares and warrants.

data.title: Huntsman to Discuss First Quarter 2026 Results on May 1, 2026
data.description: Huntsman Corporation, listed on NYSE as HUN, is scheduled to host a conference call on May 1, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET to review their financial performance in the first quarter of 2026. The call will involve a discussion of the results and a Q&A session.

data.title: Cook County Treasurer Maria Pappas recognizes Assyrian New Year by honoring civic, business and community leaders
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Chicago, Maria Pappas is set to lead an event acknowledging the Assyrian New Year 6776. The celebration aims to commend prominent figures in the civic, business, and community sectors for their remarkable impact on the Chicagoland region. Scheduled from 4:00 p.m. to 6:00 p.m., the event will highlight the achievements of leaders and their contributions to the community.

data.title: Tether exec takes charge of pro-crypto PAC before US midterms. Stablecoin yield debate heats up in Congress. #cryptonews
data.description: In the United States government, there is currently a discussion surrounding stablecoin yield that is expected to have implications for Tether and other similar digital assets. This debate is part of the deliberation on a market structure bill by lawmakers. The outcome of these discussions could have significant consequences for the cryptocurrency market and its participants.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Await Trump's Iran War Speech; Tesla Set To Reclaim EV Crown
data.description: At 9 p.m. ET, President Donald Trump is scheduled to address the nation regarding the Iran war. Tesla is expected to make deliveries early Thursday. Dow Jones Futures are eagerly anticipating Trump's speech on Iran as Tesla aims to regain its position as the leading electric vehicle manufacturer.
Rezaei, a military adviser to Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei: Iran would not stop the war until it secures what he described as its rights and deters its enemies.

data.title: The Fundrise Innovation Fund (VCX) Participates in OpenAI's $122 Billion Funding Round
data.description: The Fundrise Innovation Fund (VCX) has confirmed its involvement in OpenAI's recent funding round, further solidifying its investment in the prominent tech company. OpenAI has successfully secured $122 billion in committed capital, valuing the company at $852 billion following the funding. This marks one of the most substantial private financing rounds to date. Amazon played a significant role in this round by contributing $50 billion towards the total amount raised.
